payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Partial edge of a red-orange woven rug with a decorative patterned border and short fringed tassels visible at the left; the rug is edge-cropped (cut off by the image border) and lies on a beige tiled floor, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
